principle: Low-pull games violate invitation, field depth, trusted social boundary, or temporal contribution gates.

violated_gates: mechanical punishment without inviting field depth
Counter-Strike.notes: Simple bomb structure is not enough when exposure feels sniper/peek-driven and personally punishing.

Battle royale.exception: Fortnite can be funny as absurd cameo/cosmetic collision, not necessarily as gameplay attraction.

violated_gates: opponent attention concentrated directly on operator
personal contest without inhabitable field pull

Most survival/crafting.exception: Terraria can override via exploration/depth and bounded inhabited base-building.

Superhero movies / MCU.contrast: Trails is hypothesized as narrative-first continuity/world-memory.

positive_anchors.Ace Combat: Structured military mission field, role/atmosphere, readable pressure without social-volatility anxiety factory.
positive_anchors.SOCOM: Tactical/role military identity and mission field as positive military-game anchor.
positive_anchors.Terraria: Exploration and depth can override survival/crafting aversion; bases become durable inhabited worlds.
positive_anchors.Trails: Narrative-first continuity and world-memory rather than brand aggregation.
positive_anchors.Yume Nikki / PilotRedSun: Private experiential atmospheres; re-entry and interior texture matter more than clean public lead.
